content.en:
"There is a problem with the talent in the universe, no, strictly speaking, it is not a problem, but a flaw!"

Ye Tian pondered.

Of course, this flaw is nothing to ordinary people, and even the members of the Hidden God Organization don't know about it, perhaps the flaw of talent in the chaos is a secret.

But Ye Tian now vaguely felt that the talents in the source land were more perfect, more like they belonged to him completely, and those talents in the universe were more like the talents given to him by the Great Dao.

It's like using what others give you, no matter how you use it, it's someone else's, not your own, and if your cultivation is low, you don't think it's a problem, but if your strength is high, you must have a defect.

"I may be able to raise all my talents to the god level in the source land, and after I go out, it should be enough to replace the previous talents, but for now, I should raise the talent to the arcane level and understand the rules of the source land!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Ten years later, Ye Tian stepped into the source person area of the arcane-level talent, and started a new round of fighting, in the continuous fighting, he continued to copy the mystical-level talents of those source people, and raised all his talents to the arcane level.

In this way, Ye Tian's talent slowly improved from one percent to ten percent, and became a real mystery-level talent.

And Ye Tian also slowly involved the various rules of the source land, and after involving the rules, he really created powerful moves and secret arts, after all, the real powerful moves involve rules, otherwise they can only be regarded as ordinary moves.

"The rules of the source are different from the rules in the universe, the rules of this place are self-contained, as if they are a stronger rule, completely crushing the rules in the universe. If the rules in the universe are compared to soil, and the rules here are like stones, the rules that I understood before are like soil, and when I enter a world full of stones, how can the soil shake the stones? But if I comprehend the rules of the source, I can easily pierce through the soil with a stone spear in my hand. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Ordinary people, even if a powerful god-level powerhouse enters the source place, he can't comprehend the rules here, unless he stays here all the time, but he can copy the talent, which is equivalent to opening a plug-in.

This place is just an ordinary treasure for others, but for him, it is an opportunity against the sky.

"If I go out from here, although my strength will not skyrocket, I can easily crush the god-level powerhouses who are stronger than me, because my Dao rules will crush their rules, and even defeat the strong with the weak!"

Ye Tian was excited.

The scope of the source land is very large, there are many, many source people, and Ye Tian doesn't know how many source people there are in the source land.

As time passed, he gradually met some source people who had the talent of source time and the talent of source space, that is, the talent of time and space.

Ye Tian successfully copied and fused the source time talent and the source space talent, which was equivalent to once again gathering all the basic attribute talents, and he could once again comprehend his own Chaos Avenue in the source land, and it was also a more perfect Chaos Avenue.

Ye Tian's previous Chaos Avenue itself had reached the Origin Realm, and was in the middle of the Origin Realm, and now it was equivalent to re-cultivation, even if the Chaos Avenue in the two places was different, but Ye Tian could learn from it and improve it, and he had a complete path to walk, so the speed of comprehending the Chaos Avenue was very fast, coupled with the special nature of the source, his progress was fast.

From the initial comprehension of the law, stepping into the threshold of the Chaos Origin Dao, to the shape of the Great Dao and the law of the Great Dao, Ye Tian's progress was very fast, and his strength improved much faster.

In the blink of an eye, 3,000 years have passed, Ye Tian has finally stepped into the realm of the Great Dao Origin again, the newly formed Chaos Dao Origin is more perfect and powerful than the previous Chaos Dao Origin, and even refining Ye Tian's body all the time, this is the Origin feedback itself, which is a situation that has not appeared before.

Originally, Ye Tian's body was weakened and suppressed by the source, and there was no way to improve it at all, but at this moment, under the refining of the source, the foundation of the body was even more terrifying, and the strength of the body was increasing little by little.

Fight!

Fighting!

Understand!

Create!

......

Ye Tian was making progress almost all the time, and the progress of these short thousands of years was even comparable to the progress of hundreds of thousands of years before, and he truly comprehended the essence of the Great Dao.

With the passage of time, the source people behind him have made incredible progress in combat experience and the application of rules, and Ye Tian can learn a lot every time he fights with a source person.

Deep in the source.

Ye Tian fought with one source person after another, the rules rippled, and the avenue manifested.

Every source person almost exerts the power of the Great Dao as he wants, and every move and style seems to be very ordinary, but it contains the terrifying power of the Great Dao, and almost uses the rules of the Great Dao as an ordinary force.

In the past, Ye Tian couldn't do it to this extent, but now that he learned the fighting methods of the source people, he also did it.

Moreover, Ye Tian was still suppressing his strength, fighting with these source people, and tempering his combat power.

Soon, Ye Tian had almost learned enough, so he used his true strength to kill them.

Host: Ye Tian

Source Force Talent: God-level

Source Talent: God-level

Source Talent: God-level

Source Knife Talent: No superior

Source Sword Talent: No superior

Yuankong talent: God level

Source Talent: God-level

Source Fire Talent: God-level

Source Soil Talent: God-level

Source Gold Talent: God-level

......

"The talents have basically been promoted to the god level or no superior, and the limit of these talents is not the god level, in the universe, the limit of those talents is the god level, and it is difficult to improve it if it goes up, but it is not the limit here. It's a pity that these talents can't be fused and promoted with god-level, it seems that unless they are copied to super-god-level talents, or promoted with some treasures, there is no way at all!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

As for whether this source has super god-level talents, he can't guarantee it.

But he had a hunch that he was almost at the core of the source.

Perhaps the true secret of the source is about to be revealed.

this day.

Ye Tian went deep into the source again and saw a huge mountain.

On top of the giant mountain, one after another Yuan people stood on it, holding various weapons in their hands, and the power of various avenues surrounded the entire giant mountain.

Ye Tian checked it with the copying talent, the talents of these source people were all god-level and non-superior, and the aura was very different from the previous source people.

"Is this giant mountain the core of the source?"

Ye Tian muttered.

He even saw a giant tree on top of the mountain, and perhaps that giant tree was the true secret of the source.

When Ye Tian approached the giant mountain, one by one the source people rushed down and fought towards Ye Tian.

There are about hundreds of source people here, and each of them is very terrifying, the combat experience is very terrifying, and the comprehension of the Great Dao is beyond imagination.

For a moment, Ye Tian felt pressured.
